data.description:
## What
Add a typed `tracker` config section to `src/rebar/config.py` so the worktree dir and
branch name become first-class config keys resolved through the standard precedence
chain (`-c` flag > env > project TOML > user TOML > built-in default).

- New `TrackerConfig` dataclass: `dir: str = ".tickets-tracker"`, `branch: str = "tickets"`.
- Register in `_SECTION_CLASSES` and `_SECTIONS` with coercers: `dir` = relative-safe
  path string; `branch` = a `git check-ref-format`-style validator (reject spaces, `..`,
  leading `-`, any of `~^:?*[`, trailing `/` or `.lock`, empty).
- Auto-derived env names line up with the established override: `tracker.dir` ->
  `REBAR_TRACKER_DIR` (keep `TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR` as a legacy alias in `_LEGACY_ENV_ALIASES`);
  `tracker.branch` -> `REBAR_TRACKER_BRANCH`.
- Surface both in `rebar config` output and document in `docs/config.md`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `TrackerConfig` exists on `Config` with `dir`/`branch` defaults matching today.
- [ ] Section registered in `src/rebar/config.py` `_SECTION_CLASSES` + `_SECTIONS`.
- [ ] Branch-name validator rejects invalid git refs with a clear `ConfigError`.
- [ ] `REBAR_TRACKER_DIR` still works; `TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR` warns as legacy alias.
- [ ] `tracker.dir`/`tracker.branch` appear in `rebar config` and `docs/config.md`.

## Files
- `src/rebar/config.py`
- `docs/config.md`
data.title: config: add TrackerConfig section (tracker.dir + tracker.branch) + branch-ref validator
